macro.title: Tim Cook to become Apple Executive Chairman; John Ternus to become Apple CEO - Business Wire
Mercedes’ first all-electric C-Class is its sportiest one yet - The Verge
macro.summary: Mercedes-Benz announced the first all-electric C-Class luxury sedan, with up to 473 miles of range and fast-charging capabilities.

macro.title: FAA grounds Blue Origin New Glenn after labeling mission a ‘mishap’ - Orlando Sentinel
macro.summary: The designation grounds the rocket until the company completes an investigation.

macro.title: Alarms sound in the cockpit as two Southwest jets fly dangerously close near Nashville International Airport - CNN
macro.summary: Two Southwest Airlines Boeing 737s had to take evasive maneuvers on Saturday at Nashville International Airport after collision alarms sounded in the cockpit.

macro.title: Spirit Floats Government Stake to Avoid Possible Liquidation - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. has floated offering the US government an equity stake in the discount carrier to help stave off its potential liquidation, according to people familiar with the matter.
